heroLead: Marine engineering with a focus on quality, safety, and clear communication.
missionQuote: We deliver repair and engineering work that holds up at sea—not only on paper.

story.title: Our story
story.imageAlt: Ship repair and engineering at the quay
paragraphs: MM Group Engineering was built around practical experience in ship repair and dock operations. Since 1998 we have supported owners and operators with dependable solutions for repair and servicing of marine vessels.
We work closely with owners, superintendents, and classification societies so documentation, inspections, and handover stay aligned from first cut to sailing.

whatWeDo.title: What we do
whatWeDo.intro: Our team covers the full chain from planning to sign-off.
bullets: Structural steel, plate renewal, and hull integrity work
Piping, valves, and auxiliary systems to class rules
Welding and fabrication with traceable procedures
On-site supervision and coordination with the yard
Short port calls through full docking windows

values.title: Values
values.intro: How we run every job—on board, in the workshop, and with your office.

items.title: Safety first
items.text: Toolbox talks, permits, and clear roles on board and ashore.

items.title: Transparency
items.text: Realistic schedules, visible progress, and early escalation of risks.

items.title: Quality
items.text: Procedures, inspections, and records that support handover and future surveys.

coverage.title: Coverage
paragraphs: We support projects alongside in port and with partner yards for dockings and larger refits. Tell us your vessel type, location, and window—we will advise on feasibility and resourcing.

cta.title: Talk to us about your next repair
cta.text: Share your scope and schedule—we will respond with questions, availability, and next steps.
